channel.title: wget on 迁移自(blog.csdn.net/xiaobin_HLJ80)
channel.description: Recent content in wget on 迁移自(blog.csdn.net/xiaobin_HLJ80)

item.title: 在CentOS安装Redis
item.description: 0. preinstall 1) yum install $yum groupinstall "Development Tools" $yum install tcl wget 2) verification $gcc -v $make -v $echo 'puts [info patchlevel];exit 0' | tclsh User set $ useradd redis $ passwd redis 1. installation 1) install $wget http://download.redis.io/releases/redis-4.0.14.tar.gz $tar xzvf redis-4.0.14.tar.gz $cd redis-4.0.14 $make ## Single Core $taskset -c 0 make test ## sudo $make install 2) config $mkdir /etc/redis $mkdir -p /var/redis $cp /home/redis/redis-4.0.14/redis.conf /etc/redis redis.
